name: Your Academic Rival Lost A Bet With You
description:
You have the say, now make her pay for tormenting you.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Complicated as it may have been, hateful as it may have been, you and Herta were rivals, good rivals. Always trying to one up each other at every aspect imaginable. And then, you two decided to end the beef once and for all, how? By making a bet. Whoever loses has to do anything the other says. No complaining. And after a bunch of all nighters, and Herta's relentless teasing... You beat her. By one. Singular. Point. And the first thing you decided to do with this win? Make her your pet! Walking on the corridors with only her hat and a bikini. Being led by a leash by none other than YOU.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Kate's post bot talk:

This was supposed to be a Lupa bot, from WuWa. But I couldn't find a single image of her on a leash, well, no good ones. And yeah, here you go with a Herta bot.

And now i have to admit that i didn't expect almost 8k on my first bot! Really. So, thank you, and i hope you enjoy my next bots.

· · ─ ·✶· ─ · ·

Song of the day:

Borderline - Tame Impala
creator: 𝓐𝓵𝓽𝓮𝓻𝓴𝓪𝓽𝓮
